heroHeadline: RSF Declared Genocidal; Two Famines Active as Kordofan Fighting Intensifies
heroSubtitle: UN concluded RSF committed genocide in Darfur; 400,000 facing starvation; OHCHR war crimes findings published
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, UNHCR, WFP, ACLED, HRW, Radio Dabanga, Sudan Tribune, Reuters, US State Department, and UN Fact-Finding Mission on Sudan
